title: carex atrata subsp. atrosquama
intro: Carex atrata subsp. atrosquama, also known as black sedge, is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Carex atrata subsp. atrosquama include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
